message:
feat(ffs-block): cache concurrency design + TOCTOU race fix (bd-265)

Document the single-Mutex locking strategy and no-I/O-under-lock
invariant on ArcCache.  Fix a TOCTOU race in read_block and
write_block where concurrent access to the same block could trigger
the ARC invariant debug_assert: after dropping the lock for device
I/O, re-check residency before deciding hit vs miss.

Add two multi-threaded stress tests (8 reader threads, mixed
read/write) that exercise the cache under contention and verify no
deadlocks or invariant violations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
